entries.value:
East: Gardens of Araxie
West: Skeleton Camps
North: Village of Tears
We destroyed the waypoint to prevent the monster from reaching our village.|If you're a survivor and wish to join us, go around either through the skeleton camp.
Be careful not to let any Slimes escape when you open the door, otherwise, your bones will be used as tableware.

North: Village of Tears
 East: White lake
 South: Bridge of Tears
 West: Desert of Illusion

The desert, mirror of death, the ultimate fate of all life.|To reach its heart, one must understand the dance of existence.|From the first being to the fulfilled being, knowledge of evolution reveals the path.|And it lifts the seal that holds the bridge between the two worlds.
